data.on_this_day_count: How many on this day items

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Fetch new ZenQuotes data now (quotes + on this day), then update sensors.

randomize.name: Randomize
randomize.description: Pick a new random quote and/or on-this-day item from today's cached lists (no API call).

target.name: Target
target.description: What to randomize: quotes, on_this_day, or both.

translate.name: Translate
translate.description: Manually trigger AI translation of all current quotes and on-this-day items. Runs in the background — check sensor.zenquotes_translation_status for progress.
